memory.summary: I have free time now, but with low energy and a looming term project deadline, I should prioritize the quick chore to gain momentum before relaxing.

agent.last_reasoning: This clears the high-priority 'instant win' due at 22:00, reducing stress. While leisure is tempting, finishing this obligation first ensures I can focus on the term project later without looming deadlines.
